Announcements

Erasmus+

Announcements

Erasmus+ Study and Traineeship Mobility Written Exam  (Project No 2025-1-TR01-KA131-HED-00031955)

27
						November

2025

Project No:

2025-1-TR01-KA131-HED-00031955

The

written
exam

for Erasmus+ study and traineeship mobility programs will
be held as follows:

Written
Exam

Date:

02 December 2025 (Tuesday)

Time:

13:00 – 15:00

Venue:

Mevlana Conference Hall (Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences)

Speaking Exam

Date:

04 December 2025 (Thursday)

For students who are eligible to take the speaking exam, the exact time
and place will be announced by the

Foreign Languages Coordination Office

following the written exam.

For
detailed information and updates, please follow the announcements on our
website.

We
wish all candidates the best of luck.
